title: stylidium graminifolium
intro: Stylidium graminifolium, also known as knee-high trigger plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae. It is native to Western Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Stylidium graminifolium is often prepared into herbal teas or infusions for consumption, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
